Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportLearningObjectiveParent

An itme in the list of all parents since the cluster learning objective for the direct parent of learning objectives in this group.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Id

Gets or sets the learning objective identifier.

 integer

None.
Title

Gets or sets the title.

 string

None.
Description

Gets or sets the description.

 string

None.
